non_derivative_transactions.security_title: Common Stock, par value $0.01 per share
non_derivative_transactions.transaction_summary: The reporting person surrendered 2,644 shares to the issuer to satisfy tax withholding obligations upon vesting of a time-based restricted stock/units grant from March 6, 2017. Vesting occurred on March 5, 2021, which was the preceding business day.

non_derivative_holdings.security_title: Common Stock, par value $0.01 per share

footnotes.1: Represents the surrender of shares to the Issuer to satisfy the reporting person's tax withholding obligation upon the vesting of the reporting person's March 6, 2017 grant of time-based restricted stock/units. (Actual vesting date of March 6, 2021 was a non-business day so vesting occurred on the preceding business day.)
footnotes.2: Reflects the reporting person's interest in equivalent shares of Henry Schein common stock held by the unitized stock fund in the Henry Schein, Inc. 401(k) Savings Plan (the "Plan").  The unitized stock fund consists of Henry Schein common stock and cash or cash equivalents. The number of shares attributed to the reporting person as a participant in the Plan and expressed as equivalent shares has been calculated based on the closing price of Henry Schein common stock on March 5, 2021.

signatures.signature_name: /s/ Jennifer Ferrero (as Attorney-in-Fact for Steven Paladino)
